commands.review_summary:
The PR adds QQBot-local classification for OpenClaw core slash commands, blocks private-only core commands in QQ group/guild chats with a private-chat-only reply, and reuses that reply for QQBot c2cOnly plugin commands.

PR surface: Source +130, Tests +54. Total +184 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: no. live QQBot reproduction was run. Source inspection shows the current-main path: authorized group control commands can pass group gating and reach runtime dispatch, which is enough to review the proposed gate but not a live transport proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No mechanical repair is identified; the remaining action is maintainer/owner review of the intentional QQBot group compatibility change and normal merge proof.

target.title: Gate private QQBot group commands
target.body:
## Summary

- Add QQBot-local command visibility classification for OpenClaw core slash commands.
- Reject private-only core slash commands in QQ groups after ingress access and mention gating, with a private-chat-only message.
- Reuse the same private-chat-only message for QQBot plugin slash commands marked `c2cOnly`.

The classification keeps safe group commands visible, keeps group-session controls callable but hidden from group menus, and blocks sensitive config/export/shell/debug/admin commands from group use.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/command-visibility.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-commands-impl.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/outbound-dispatch.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/command-visibility.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/command-visibility.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-commands.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-commands-impl.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/bridge/commands/framework-registration.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/gateway.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
